recommended_pattern: A single-task native screen with one clear primary action, reachable controls, and visible system or task status.

decision_rules.if_frequent_task: Make the primary action thumb-reachable and preserve it as content changes.
decision_rules.if_error_prone: Validate inline and explain recovery before the user commits an irreversible step.
decision_rules.if_dynamic_status: Pair status color with text, icon, or state label that remains readable at a glance.

anti_patterns: Web-card density squeezed into a phone viewport.
Touch targets that depend on precise taps or hidden gestures without cues.
Critical status communicated by color alone.
